Name: Hammerhead Shark
Description: This brute is the ultimate hunter, with a head like a sledgehammer to hold down its prey against the seafloor. And them eyes on the ends of its head give it a complete field of vision, so there ain't no place you can hide that it won't spot you. It can detect the smallest electrical impulses of a beating heart buried under the sand, so if it gets your scent, you'd better hold on to your pole for dear life.
